changeSet.author: claude
changeSet.comment: Drop the 50-character cap on a tag: tag becomes TEXT, matching how word/translation were widened. The UNIQUE (fk_dictionary_id, tag) constraint and the tag index are rebuilt by Postgres automatically. Note the remaining hard limit is the btree index row size (~2704 bytes), not a column length - a pathologically long tag now fails at the index rather than at validation.
